title: lycopodium pflanzii
intro: Lycopodium pflanzii, also known as the club moss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium pflanzii include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Lycopodium pflanzii is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, teas, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
